# Perth Concrete Care

> Perth Concrete Care is a concrete flooring specialist serving the Perth metropolitan area, Western Australia, north and south of the river. Services: concrete polishing, concrete grinding, honed concrete (grind and seal), exposed aggregate honing and sealing, epoxy flake flooring, and metallic epoxy flooring for residential and commercial floors. Fully insured, WA owned and operated, with H-class HEPA dust control. Free fixed-price quotes, most answered within 24 hours.

Key facts:
- Phone: 0448 483 226
- Email: sales@perthconcretecare.com.au
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 7:00am–6:00pm
- ABN: 63 775 263 307
- Service area: Perth metropolitan area, north and south of the river. Suburbs include Butler, Alkimos, Yanchep, Mindarie, Clarkson, Joondalup, Wanneroo, Banksia Grove, Ellenbrook, Wangara, Malaga, Osborne Park, Balcatta, Scarborough, North Perth, Perth CBD, Rossmoyne, Willetton, Canning Vale, Fremantle, Cannington, Booragoon, Bull Creek, Melville, Bentley
- Surface preparation to Australian Standards: AS 1884, AS 3730, AS 3610, CSP/ICRI profiles
- Slip-rated outdoor finishes available (P3–P5)

## Services

- [Epoxy flake flooring Perth](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/epoxy-flake-flooring-perth): Epoxy flake floors for garages, workshops and patios. $85–$100/m².
- [Metallic epoxy flooring Perth](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/metallic-epoxy-flooring-perth): Decorative high-gloss metallic epoxy floors. $160–$180/m².
- [Honed concrete Perth](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/honed-concrete-perth): Hone-and-seal for alfresco, pool surrounds, driveways; smooths rough exposed aggregate. $60–$80/m².
- [Concrete polishing Perth](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/concrete-polishing-perth): Mechanically polished concrete for indoor floors. $140–$220/m².
- [Concrete grinding Perth](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/concrete-grinding-perth): Grinding, coating/glue removal, slab levelling and surface preparation.
- [Epoxy floor visualiser](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/epoxy-floor-visualiser-perth): Preview epoxy flake colours on your floor.

## Pricing

- [Structured pricing data](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/pricing.md): Machine-readable price guide per service.
- Pricing depends on floor area, slab hardness, access, existing coatings, repairs and finish level. Larger areas achieve lower per-m² rates. Final pricing confirmed after free on-site inspection.

- [Quote request form](https://perthconcretecare.com.au/#quote): Free fixed-price written quotes with photo upload.

- [Google Business Profile](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Perth%20Concrete%20Care&query_place_id=ChIJI46s7Fr-hYkRvR2K6Rlvbrk): 5-star customer reviews.
